## Checklist

- [ ] PR title follows [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, `refactor:`, `chore:`, `test:`, `perf:`, `ci:`, `build:`, `style:`, or `revert:`)
- [ ] Documentation updated (`README.md` / `*.docs.md`)
- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] No new ESLint warnings (`yarn lint:check`)
